conversation.text: Yes, CINNOX supports WhatsApp Business integration. According to our CINNOX Feature List (2026), you can manage WhatsApp inquiries directly from the CINNOX platform, alongside other channels. Source: EN_CINNOX_Feature_List_v2026.

WhatsApp is available on the Omnichannel Contact Centre (OCC) and Ultimate CX Hub (CXHub) plans. It is not included in the Digital Commerce (DC) plan. Source: CINNOX Documentation — Signup a CINNOX Account.
Can we run WhatsApp marketing campaigns?

Yes, WhatsApp campaign messaging is supported. Based on our Feature List, campaign management is available, and WhatsApp campaigns can be run with 360dialog integration. You can also purchase a WhatsApp Business number as an add-on — for specific number pricing, I'd recommend speaking with our sales team for an accurate quote. Source: EN_CINNOX_Feature_List_v2026.
